_session_note: Balancing session. Resource rules redesigned, reference land calibrated, carnivore food_need not yet finalized.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.status: active — resource system redesigned, cards will be replaced, carnivore balance pending
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O. Will be replaced entirely.
module_roles.biome.rs: World state: land slots, active biomes, placed organisms, fitness resolution, biome contests, world effect application. Zero I/O.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks (organism, mutation, env), two hands (combined limit 5, env limit 3), discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.

turn_structure.declare: Human and AI declare intentions simultaneously. Cards removed from hand immediately.
turn_structure.react: All intentions visible. One round to retarget, withdraw, add buffer.
turn_structure.commit: Execute intentions, world resolve, world event, next turn.

hand_and_deck_rules.three_decks: organism deck, mutation deck, environment deck — separate draws
hand_and_deck_rules.graveyard: played organisms, activated biomes, used modifiers — never recycles

system_constants.SHADE_K: 0.4 (confirmed by simulation, NOT YET in code — currently 0.1)

resource_rules.sunlight: Tolerance (tf), NOT a resource. NOT scaled by population. Reduced by shading from larger producers. Producer has sun_need as tolerance minimum.
resource_rules.minerals: Competitive among producers, reach-based, scales with pop. rf(share, mineral_need * pop). Sets multi-species Wendepunkt at total_pop=8.
resource_rules.moisture: Tolerance only, not competitive. Renamed from water_level throughout codebase.
resource_rules.water: Competitive among animals ONLY. Producers do NOT use water.
resource_rules.food: Shared pool from producers. food_pool = sum(pop * fitness * food_multiplier). No base_food_value field.
resource_rules.predation: Hunt limit = size * hunt_multiplier (strictly <, not <=). No intraspecies predation (card.id check). Carnivore-as-prey = 0.5x value.

sunlight_shading.mechanism: Sort producers by size descending. Largest get full biome.sunlight. Each group reduces available_light for next group: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K.
sunlight_shading.effect: Smaller producers under larger ones suffer fitness penalty if available_light < sun_need.
sunlight_shading.shade_specialist: Low sun_need organism thrives under large producers — valid design niche.

producer_pressure.applies_to: herbivores and omnivores only — carnivores exert NO producer pressure

reference_land.note: sunlight=4.0 chosen so shading has meaningful effect. minerals=6.0 sets Wendepunkt at total_producer_pop=8 for two same-size cards.

omnivore.food_mechanic: best split between producer pool and herbivore biomass
omnivore.mali_rationale: territory +0.3 and food_need +0.3 vs herbivore — cost of flexibility

carnivore.food_need: NOT FINALIZED — tested 1.0-2.0, system too unstable at mobile simulation scale
carnivore.design_note: population should visually match herbivore count but represent less biomass (CARNIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR=0.5)

confirmed_dynamics.single_producer_card: theoretical equilibrium p=8, POP_MAX=6 stops it — always growing at max pop
confirmed_dynamics.two_producer_cards_same_size: Wendepunkt at total_pop=8 via mineral competition (p=4 each → fitness ≈ 0.7)
confirmed_dynamics.two_producer_cards_with_shading: smaller card equilibrium shifts to p=3, total ~6-7
confirmed_dynamics.shade_specialist_niche: low sun_need thrives under large producers — intentional design space
confirmed_dynamics.herbivore_without_carnivore: grows to h=3-4 on reference land, then stabilizes via food pool exhaustion
confirmed_dynamics.carnivore_role: stabilizes herbivore population, prevents producer collapse from overgrazing
confirmed_dynamics.producer_regulation: sunlight (tolerance) + minerals (competitive) + territory — three independent factors

open_issues: Carnivore food_need NOT FINALIZED — needs PC simulation at high populations
predation_factor BUG: uses average prey pool per carnivore instead of total_carn_need / total_prey_value — must fix before carnivore tuning
SHADE_K=0.4 and PRESS_K1/K2=0.1 confirmed but NOT YET updated in code
All existing cards will be replaced — new alien/fantasy theme ('The Future is Wild' aesthetic)
Omnivore high-pop simulation not yet done
WASM build working — pkg/ folder must be alongside index.html, python server required
next_session_tasks: 1. Fix predation_factor bug: remove averaging, use total_carn_need / total_prey_value directly
2. Update SHADE_K=0.4, PRESS_K1=0.1, PRESS_K2=0.1 in types.rs
3. Finalize carnivore food_need with corrected predation formula at p=6/8 producer
5. Begin new card design — alien/fantasy theme, all roles

biome_system.land_slots: each land starts with a standard biome (stack 0)
biome_system.standard_biome_replacement: free placement, no buffer needed, no contest
biome_system.player_biome_contest: must provide buffer > current stack size to challenge
biome_system.contest_resolution: highest stack wins; ties carry to next turn
biome_system.modifier_transfer: when biome replaced, player modifiers transfer if tag compatible and health >= min_health

card_design_principles.theme: Alien/fantasy planet — biologically consistent foreign creatures. 'The Future is Wild' aesthetic.
card_design_principles.biome_tag_policy: biome_tags only for genuine biological impossibility. Traits and resource needs self-regulate fitness.
